title: The Day Raisiny
poem:
The day
raisiny   silky   fair
                 smiling
The luster of pearls hidden
                 under its petals

Depths the color of surma
                     the emotions calm
When you wake it’s like a dream waking
asking for someone ...
                       The silence of a toy
                        half awake
Isn’t this what you are, dear heart?

____

And this lap
silky   fair      restless
                     For whom is it
                     restless
today?

____

Go
springtime
                     go.
I turned my back long ago.
                     Don’t show me
any more dreams.

Though you are eternal
though life is eternal
                     even so
have mercy.
